scripts.setup: npm run infra && npm run db:setup -w backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.verify: npm run setup && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify && npm run test:e2e && npm run benchmark
